highlights.text: Serial code PY-008 | TRAGUIN tour code TG-PY-EDU-008
State / Country: Puducherry, India | Category: Educational School Tour
Destinations: White Town • Auroville • Arikamedu Archaeological Site • Chunnambar
Ideal for: School Students, Educators, Academic Delegations
Vehicle: Premium Air-Conditioned Luxury Coaches (GPS-enabled, First-Aid Equipped)
Meal Plan: All Meals Included (Buffet Breakfast, Balanced Lunch, Healthy Evening High-Tea & Dinner)
Route Map: Chennai/Puducherry Arrival → White Town History Walk → Auroville Township → Arikamedu Site → Departure
TRAGUIN Signature Experience: Specialized learning curricula designed in tandem with institutional syllabi, combining leisure with real academic growth.
Curated by TRAGUIN Experts: Restaurants handpicked to guarantee highly nutritious, child-friendly, hygienic food variations.

Shopping & Local Experiences: Goubert Market & Cluny Embroidery Center: Perfect for exploring local organic cotton weaving and handcrafted lace work. Instagram Spots: The vibrant yellow-walled French alleys of Romain Rolland Street and Suffren Street.

Important Notes: School NOC and student medical files must be updated and provided to TRAGUIN 15 days prior to travel commencement. Carrying sunscreen, comfortable walking shoes, and caps is highly recommended for archaeological field surveys. Due to high institutional movement, coach bookings and entry slot blockings require an early advance confirmation timeline.

itinerary.title: Premium Puducherry Educational Tour Package
itinerary.tagline: Premium Puducherry Educational Tour Package • 03 Nights / 04 Days
itinerary.overview:
Welcome to India's pristine window to French heritage and conscious global living. This bespoke Educational Puducherry Tour curated dynamically by TRAGUIN merges academic learning with high-end comfort, ensuring highly enriching, safe, and immersive experiences for students and educators alike. Walk along historic cobblestone lanes, discover world-class architectural marvels, study archaeological origins, and secure unforgettable memories. Our premium stays and handpicked hotels promise total student safety, top-tier hygiene, and nourishing culinary layouts.

TOUR OVERVIEW
Vehicle Type: Premium Air-Conditioned Luxury Coaches (GPS-enabled, First-Aid Equipped)
Meal Plan: All Meals Included (Buffet Breakfast, Balanced Lunch, Healthy Evening High-Tea & Dinner)
Route Plan: Chennai/Puducherry Arrival → White Town History Walk → Auroville Township → Arikamedu Site → Departure

Curated Note:
This premium student holiday features full certified student insurance cover, dedicated educational field guides, mineral water distribution, and 24/7 centralized monitoring backed by TRAGUIN Support.

Puducherry serves as an unparalleled living historical laboratory, making it a highly requested choice for a Best Puducherry Tour Package or an interactive Puducherry Family Tour. Combining Franco-Tamil history, global sociology, and marine ecology, it offers profound knowledge trails for academic groups.
White Town (French Quarter): A colonial architectural masterclass featuring iconic attractions, pastel facades, and unique urban layouts perfect for history mapping.
Auroville Experimental Township: An inspiring international community centered on human unity, architecture, and sustainability, home to the magnificent Matrimandir.
Arikamedu Archaeological Site: An ancient Indo-Roman trading port dating back to the 2nd Century BC, providing profound lessons in history and maritime trade archaeology.
Best Time to Visit Puducherry: The pleasant winter window between October and March is the optimal time for outdoor Puducherry Sightseeing and learning journeys.
itinerary.seo_title: PY-008 | Premium Puducherry Educational Tour Package | TRAGUIN
itinerary.seo_description: Premium 03 Nights / 04 Days Puducherry educational package (PY-008 / TG-PY-EDU-008): White Town, Auroville, Arikamedu Archaeological Site, Chunnambar, and 4-tier handpicked accommodation.

highlights.text: White Town colonial heritage mapping walk and Franco-Indian history orientation workshop
Auroville Visitors Centre sustainable development briefing and Matrimandir Viewpoint
Arikamedu Archaeological Ruins Indo-Roman trading station and Chunnambar backwater eco-systems
Sri Aurobindo Ashram spiritual education and competitive historic quiz with exclusive rewards
TRAGUIN Signature Experience: Specialized learning curricula aligned with institutional syllabi

days.title: Arrival in Puducherry – White Town Colonial Heritage Mapping
days.description: Arrive in the coastal paradise of Puducherry, where your dedicated TRAGUIN tour managers provide a warm corporate welcome. Board your premium luxury coach to transfer smoothly to your handpicked hotel for student-allocated room check-ins. In the afternoon, embark on an insightful, expert-guided architectural heritage walk through White Town. Students will map the historic French layout, view the monument memorials, and study the architectural synthesis of Franco-Tamil neighborhoods.
activities: Sightseeing Included: White Town Quarter, French War Memorial, Promenade Beachwalk
Evening Experience: Interactive student briefing and orientation workshop on Franco-Indian history by a guest historian.

days.title: Auroville Experience – Conscious Sustainability & Matrimandir
days.description: Relish a wholesome, premium breakfast at the hotel restaurant. Today, we journey to the famous international township of Auroville. Students will experience a curated educational briefing at the Auroville Visitors Centre, studying sustainable development, eco-friendly architecture, and water-harvesting models. Walk through organic shaded trails to view the spectacular golden dome of the Matrimandir from the panoramic viewing point, absorbing lessons in modern architecture and global social harmony.
activities: Sightseeing Included: Auroville International Township, Matrimandir Viewpoint, Auroville Bamboo Research Center
Photography Points: The breathtaking landscapes framing the architectural wonder of Matrimandir.

days.title: Arikamedu Indo-Roman Archaeology & Chunnambar Eco-Systems
days.description: Following a refreshing breakfast, travel to the historically legendary Arikamedu Archaeological Site. Guided by an expert archaeological educator, students will explore the ancient ruins of this Indo-Roman trading station, discovering Roman pottery findings, bead-making history, and ancient maritime links. In the afternoon, transition to Chunnambar Boat House for a safe cruise along backwater rivers to learn about coastal marine eco-systems, mangroves, and sandbars.
activities: Sightseeing Included: Arikamedu Archaeological Ruins, Chunnambar Backwaters, Paradise Beach Spit
Local Experience: Group field-notes session and competitive historic quiz with exclusive rewards.

days.title: Spiritual Education & Farewell with Unforgettable Memories
days.description: Indulge in your final morning breakfast. Check out of your premium stays and enjoy a quiet visit to the iconic Sri Aurobindo Ashram, learning about its rich literary, philosophical, and physical education contributions to modern India. Conclude the tour with a short shopping stop to buy handmade paper products or local clay crafts. Transfer comfortably back to your departure terminal as your exceptional Premium Puducherry Experience draws to a close, leaving everyone with deep knowledge and unforgettable memories powered by TRAGUIN.
activities: Assistance: Full baggage management and smooth departure boarding facilitation by our tour coaches.

All buffet meals prepared under strict hygiene parameters.
Private luxury AC coaches for all transfers and academic travel.
Complimentary entry permissions and cruise boat tickets at Chunnambar.
